    memset(reply, 0, sizeof(reply));

    if (s->cb) {
        s->cb(buf, reply, sizeof(reply), s->user);
    } else {
        snprintf(reply, sizeof(reply), "ERR");
    }

    g_output_stream_write(out, reply, strlen(reply), NULL, NULL);
    g_output_stream_write(out, "\n", 1, NULL, NULL);
    g_output_stream_flush(out, NULL, NULL);

    return FALSE;
}

ctrl_server_t* ctrl_server_create(const char* socket_path, ctrl_command_cb cb, void* user) {
    ctrl_server_t* s = g_new0(ctrl_server_t, 1);
    if (!s) {
        return NULL;
    }
    snprintf(s->socket_path, sizeof(s->socket_path), "%s",
             socket_path ? socket_path : "/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock");
    s->cb = cb;
    s->user = user;
    return s;
}

void ctrl_server_destroy(ctrl_server_t* s) {
    if (!s) {
        return;
    }
    if (s->service) {
        g_object_unref(s->service);
    }
    g_remove(s->socket_path);
    g_free(s);
}

int ctrl_server_start(ctrl_server_t* s) {
    if (!s) {
        return -1;
    }

    g_remove(s->socket_path);

    s->service = g_socket_service_new();
    if (!s->service) {
        return -1;
    }

    GError* err = NULL;
    GSocketAddress* addr = g_unix_socket_address_new(s->socket_path);
    gboolean ok = g_socket_listener_add_address(
        G_SOCKET_LISTENER(s->service),
        addr,
        G_SOCKET_TYPE_STREAM,
        G_SOCKET_PROTOCOL_DEFAULT,
        NULL,
        NULL,
        &err
    );
    g_object_unref(addr);

    if (!ok) {
        log_error("ctrl bind failed: %s", err ? err->message : "unknown");
        if (err) g_error_free(err);
        return -1;
    }

    g_signal_connect(s->service, "incoming", G_CALLBACK(on_incoming), s);
    g_socket_service_start(s->service);

    log_info("Control socket listening: %s", s->socket_path);
    return 0;
}

include/app.h

C
#pragma once
#include <gio/gio.h>
#include "bluez_agent.h"
#include "bluez_manager.h"
#include "ctrl_server.h"
#include "hfp_backend.h"
#include "map_mse.h"

typedef struct app {
    GMainLoop* loop;
    GDBusConnection* bus;
    bluez_agent_t* agent;
    bluez_manager_t* bluez;
    ctrl_server_t* ctrl;
    hfp_backend_t* hfp;
    map_mse_t* map;
    char last_device_addr[18];
} app_t;

app_t* app_create(void);
void app_destroy(app_t* a);

int app_start(app_t* a);
int app_handle_command(const char* cmd, char* out, int out_sz, void* user);

src/app.c

C
#include "app.h"
#include "map_sdp.h"
#include "log.h"
#include <string.h>
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>

static void on_device_event(const char* addr, const char* path, int connected, int paired, void* user) {
    app_t* a = (app_t*) user;
    if (!a || !addr) {
        return;
    }
    snprintf(a->last_device_addr, sizeof(a->last_device_addr), "%s", addr);
    log_info("Device event: addr=%s path=%s connected=%d paired=%d", addr, path ? path : "", connected, paired);
}

app_t* app_create(void) {
    app_t* a = g_new0(app_t, 1);
    if (!a) {
        return NULL;
    }

    GError* err = NULL;
    a->bus = g_bus_get_sync(G_BUS_TYPE_SYSTEM, NULL, &err);
    if (!a->bus) {
        log_error("System bus connect failed: %s", err ? err->message : "unknown");
        if (err) g_error_free(err);
        app_destroy(a);
        return NULL;
    }

    a->loop = g_main_loop_new(NULL, FALSE);
    a->agent = bluez_agent_create(a->bus, "/bt_hfp_chatd/agent");
    a->bluez = bluez_manager_create(a->bus);
    a->ctrl = ctrl_server_create("/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock", app_handle_command, a);
    a->hfp = hfp_backend_create();
    a->map = map_mse_create();

    if (!a->loop || !a->agent || !a->bluez || !a->ctrl || !a->hfp || !a->map) {
        app_destroy(a);
        return NULL;
    }

    bluez_manager_set_device_event_cb(a->bluez, on_device_event, a);
    return a;
}

void app_destroy(app_t* a) {
    if (!a) {
        return;
    }

    if (a->agent) {
        bluez_agent_unregister(a->agent);
    }

    if (a->ctrl) ctrl_server_destroy(a->ctrl);
    if (a->bluez) bluez_manager_destroy(a->bluez);
    if (a->agent) bluez_agent_destroy(a->agent);
    if (a->hfp) hfp_backend_destroy(a->hfp);
    if (a->map) map_mse_destroy(a->map);
    if (a->loop) g_main_loop_unref(a->loop);
    if (a->bus) g_object_unref(a->bus);

    g_free(a);
}

int app_start(app_t* a) {
    if (!a) {
        return -1;
    }

    if (bluez_manager_start(a->bluez) < 0) {
        return -1;
    }

    if (bluez_agent_register(a->agent) < 0) {
        log_warn("Agent registration failed; pairing may not work");
    }

    if (bluez_manager_power_on_default_adapter(a->bluez) < 0) {
        log_warn("Adapter power-on failed");
    }

    if (ctrl_server_start(a->ctrl) < 0) {
        return -1;
    }

    log_info("Application started");
    return 0;
}

static int parse_addr_arg(const char* cmd, const char* prefix, char* out_addr, int out_addr_sz) {
    if (!cmd || !prefix || !out_addr || out_addr_sz <= 0) {
        return -1;
    }
    if (strncmp(cmd, prefix, strlen(prefix)) != 0) {
        return -1;
    }
    const char* p = cmd + strlen(prefix);
    while (*p == ' ') p++;
    if (*p == 0) return -1;
    snprintf(out_addr, (size_t) out_addr_sz, "%s", p);
    return 0;
}

int app_handle_command(const char* cmd, char* out, int out_sz, void* user) {
    app_t* a = (app_t*) user;
    if (!a || !cmd || !out || out_sz <= 0) {
        return -1;
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "PING") == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "PONG");
        return 0;
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "SCAN_START") == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, bluez_manager_start_discovery(a->bluez) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "SCAN_STOP") == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, bluez_manager_stop_discovery(a->bluez) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "DEVICES") == 0) {
        return bluez_manager_list_devices(a->bluez, out, out_sz);
    }

    char addr[64];

    if (parse_addr_arg(cmd, "PAIR ", addr, sizeof(addr)) == 0) {
        int rc = 0;
        rc |= bluez_manager_trust_device(a->bluez, addr);
        rc |= bluez_manager_pair_device(a->bluez, addr);
        snprintf(out, out_sz, rc == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (parse_addr_arg(cmd, "CONNECT ", addr, sizeof(addr)) == 0) {
        int rc = 0;
        rc |= bluez_manager_trust_device(a->bluez, addr);
        rc |= bluez_manager_connect_device(a->bluez, addr);
        snprintf(out, out_sz, rc == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (parse_addr_arg(cmd, "DISCONNECT ", addr, sizeof(addr)) == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, bluez_manager_disconnect_device(a->bluez, addr) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "CHAT_START") == 0) {
        const char* use_addr = a->last_device_addr[0] ? a->last_device_addr : NULL;
        return hfp_backend_chat_start(a->hfp, use_addr, out, out_sz);
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "CHAT_STOP") == 0) {
        return hfp_backend_chat_stop(a->hfp, out, out_sz);
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "MAP_STATUS") == 0) {
        return map_mse_status(a->map, out, out_sz);
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "MSG_LIST") == 0) {
        return map_mse_msg_list(a->map, out, out_sz);
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "MSG_CLEAR") == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, map_mse_msg_clear(a->map) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (strncmp(cmd, "MSG_NOTIFY ", 11) == 0) {
        const char* p = cmd + 11;
        while (*p == ' ') p++;
        if (strcmp(p, "ON") == 0) {
            map_mse_notify_set(a->map, 1);
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "OK");
            return 0;
        }
        if (strcmp(p, "OFF") == 0) {
            map_mse_notify_set(a->map, 0);
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "OK");
            return 0;
        }
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
        return -1;
    }

    if (strncmp(cmd, "MSG_SEND ", 9) == 0) {
        const char* p = cmd + 9;
        while (*p == ' ') p++;
        const char* sp = strchr(p, ' ');
        if (!sp) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }

        char msg_addr[32];
        size_t n = (size_t) (sp - p);
        if (n >= sizeof(msg_addr)) n = sizeof(msg_addr) - 1;
        memcpy(msg_addr, p, n);
        msg_addr[n] = 0;

        const char* text = sp + 1;
        while (*text == ' ') text++;
        if (*text == 0) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }

        uint32_t id = 0;
        if (map_mse_msg_send(a->map, msg_addr, text, &id) == 0) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "OK id=%u", id);
            return 0;
        }
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
        return -1;
    }

    if (strncmp(cmd, "MSG_INJECT_RX ", 14) == 0) {
        const char* p = cmd + 14;
        while (*p == ' ') p++;
        const char* sp = strchr(p, ' ');
        if (!sp) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }

        char msg_addr[32];
        size_t n = (size_t) (sp - p);
        if (n >= sizeof(msg_addr)) n = sizeof(msg_addr) - 1;
        memcpy(msg_addr, p, n);
        msg_addr[n] = 0;

        const char* text = sp + 1;
        while (*text == ' ') text++;
        if (*text == 0) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }

        uint32_t id = 0;
        if (map_mse_inject_rx(a->map, msg_addr, text, &id) == 0) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "OK id=%u", id);
            return 0;
        }
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
        return -1;
    }

    if (strncmp(cmd, "MSG_MARK_READ ", 14) == 0) {
        uint32_t id = 0;
        int v = 0;
        if (sscanf(cmd + 14, "%u %d", &id, &v) != 2) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }
        snprintf(out, out_sz, map_mse_mark_read(a->map, id, v) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (strncmp(cmd, "MSG_DELIVERY ", 13) == 0) {
        uint32_t id = 0;
        int v = 0;
        if (sscanf(cmd + 13, "%u %d", &id, &v) != 2) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }
        snprintf(out, out_sz, map_mse_delivery(a->map, id, v) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "MSG_EVENTS") == 0) {
        return map_mse_events(a->map, out, out_sz);
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "MAP_SDP_XML") == 0) {
        return map_sdp_build_mas_record_xml(out, out_sz, 1, "MAP Message Access", 1);
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "LAST_DEVICE") == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "%s", a->last_device_addr[0] ? a->last_device_addr : "EMPTY");
        return 0;
    }

    snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR unknown_command");
    return -1;
}

src/main.c

C
#include "app.h"
#include "log.h"
#include <signal.h>

static app_t* g_app = NULL;

static void on_sigint(int sig) {
    (void) sig;
    if (g_app && g_app->loop) {
        g_main_loop_quit(g_app->loop);
    }
}

int main(void) {
    signal(SIGINT, on_sigint);
    signal(SIGTERM, on_sigint);

    log_init();

    g_app = app_create();
    if (!g_app) {
        log_error("app_create failed");
        return 1;
    }

    if (app_start(g_app) < 0) {
        log_error("app_start failed");
        app_destroy(g_app);
        return 1;
    }

    log_info("Running main loop");
    g_main_loop_run(g_app->loop);

    log_info("Stopping");
    app_destroy(g_app);
    return 0;
}

How to build on Ubuntu

Install dependencies:

Bash
sudo apt update
sudo apt install -y build-essential pkg-config libglib2.0-dev libdbus-1-dev

Build:

Bash
make

Run:

Bash
sudo ./bt_hfp_chatd_c_bluez_dbus

sudo is often needed because:

  • system D-Bus access

  • BlueZ control operations

  • pairing/agent actions

How to test control commands

From another terminal:

Bash
printf "PING\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "DEVICES\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "SCAN_START\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "SCAN_STOP\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "PAIR AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "CONNECT AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "CHAT_START\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "MAP_STATUS\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "MSG_SEND AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF hello\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "MSG_LIST\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "MSG_NOTIFY ON\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "MSG_INJECT_RX AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF incoming_text\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "MSG_EVENTS\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "MAP_SDP_XML\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock

Honest status of this project

What is implemented:

  • BlueZ system-bus connection

  • BlueZ agent registration

  • adapter detection and power-on

  • discovery start/stop

  • device list

  • pair / trust / connect / disconnect through org.bluez.Device1

  • control socket daemon

  • local MAP-style message store foundation

  • local notification queue foundation

  • MAS SDP XML generator for debugging/next-step integration

What is not production-finished:

  • real HFP Audio Gateway backend

  • real SCO audio path

  • real MAP OBEX server transport

  • real MAS SDP registration through BlueZ profile/plugin plumbing

  • smart-headset-specific interoperability tuning

So this is a clean BlueZ + D-Bus project foundation, not a false claim that BlueZ D-Bus alone already gives you the full Android-equivalent Bluetooth voice-chat stack.

The next correct step is to replace hfp_backend.c with one real backend path:

  • oFono/hsphfpd integration, or

  • BlueZ plugin/socket-level HFP AG implementation.

If you want, I’ll continue in the next message with the real backend integration layer design for HFP/SCO on top of this exact source tree.


You said:
Go ahead! I want you to add them and "multi pairing and one processing at a time" functionality on the device in this project.

ChatGPT said:

I’m extending the BlueZ/D-Bus version in the honest direction: real backend-ready structure plus device-slot management for multi-pairing with a single active processing device. I’m checking the current BlueZ/ofono interfaces first so the added code matches real integration points instead of made-up APIs.

I’ve mapped this into two concrete additions: a real BlueZ Profile1 registration path for HFP-AG service-level connections, and a device-slot manager that allows many paired devices while forcing only one active processing device at a time. I’m packaging it as drop-in source files plus the exact changes to app, bluez_manager, and Makefile so you can layer it onto the code I already gave you.

Below is the next in-chat source update for the BlueZ + D-Bus version.

What this adds:

  • BlueZ Profile1 registration for HFP AG using org.bluez.ProfileManager1.RegisterProfile, which BlueZ documents for the HFP AG UUID (0000111f-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb) and allows to carry options like Role, RequireAuthentication, AutoConnect, Features, and a manual ServiceRecord. BlueZ also documents that the profile object must implement org.bluez.Profile1, including NewConnection and RequestDisconnection. GitHub+1

  • Multi-pairing with one processing device at a time:

    • many devices can be paired/trusted/connected

    • only one device can be the active processing device

    • if another device tries to take the active slot while one is busy, the daemon returns BUSY

  • Targeted profile connect/disconnect using org.bluez.Device1.ConnectProfile / DisconnectProfile, which BlueZ exposes for specific profile UUIDs. Ubuntu Manpages

  • BlueZ agent handling still uses the standard AgentManager1 model, where an application can register one agent and optionally request it as default. Ubuntu Manpages

Important honesty:

  • This still does not give you a full SCO audio path yet.

  • It does give you the correct service-level HFP AG profile registration path and a real place to receive the profile connection FD through NewConnection.

  • The actual audio backend remains a separate step.

1) Add new headers

include/device_slots.h

C
#pragma once

#define DEVICE_SLOTS_MAX 16

typedef struct {
    int used;
    char addr[18];
    char path[128];
    int paired;
    int trusted;
    int connected;
    int profile_connected;
    int active_processing;
} device_slot_t;

typedef struct device_slots {
    device_slot_t items[DEVICE_SLOTS_MAX];
    int active_index;
} device_slots_t;

void device_slots_init(device_slots_t* s);

int device_slots_upsert(device_slots_t* s, const char* addr, const char* path);
int device_slots_find_by_addr(const device_slots_t* s, const char* addr);
int device_slots_find_active(const device_slots_t* s);

int device_slots_set_pair_state(device_slots_t* s, const char* addr, int paired);
int device_slots_set_connected_state(device_slots_t* s, const char* addr, int connected);
int device_slots_set_profile_state(device_slots_t* s, const char* addr, int profile_connected);
int device_slots_set_trusted_state(device_slots_t* s, const char* addr, int trusted);

int device_slots_set_active(device_slots_t* s, const char* addr);
int device_slots_clear_active(device_slots_t* s);
const char* device_slots_get_active_addr(const device_slots_t* s);

int device_slots_can_process_addr(const device_slots_t* s, const char* addr);
int device_slots_format(const device_slots_t* s, char* out, int out_sz);

include/bluez_profile.h

C
#pragma once
#include <gio/gio.h>

typedef struct bluez_profile bluez_profile_t;

typedef void (*bluez_profile_connection_cb)(
    const char* device_path,
    int fd,
    unsigned int version,
    unsigned int features,
    void* user);

typedef void (*bluez_profile_disconnection_cb)(
    const char* device_path,
    void* user);

bluez_profile_t* bluez_profile_create(GDBusConnection* conn,
                                      const char* object_path,
                                      const char* uuid,
                                      const char* service_record_xml,
                                      const char* service_name);

void bluez_profile_destroy(bluez_profile_t* p);

int bluez_profile_register(bluez_profile_t* p);
int bluez_profile_unregister(bluez_profile_t* p);

void bluez_profile_set_callbacks(bluez_profile_t* p,
                                 bluez_profile_connection_cb on_conn,
                                 bluez_profile_disconnection_cb on_disconn,
                                 void* user);

2) Add new sources

src/device_slots.c

C
#include "device_slots.h"
#include <string.h>
#include <stdio.h>

void device_slots_init(device_slots_t* s) {
    if (!s) return;
    memset(s, 0, sizeof(*s));
    s->active_index = -1;
}

static int alloc_slot(device_slots_t* s) {
    for (int i = 0; i < DEVICE_SLOTS_MAX; ++i) {
        if (!s->items[i].used) {
            s->items[i].used = 1;
            return i;
        }
    }
    return -1;
}

int device_slots_find_by_addr(const device_slots_t* s, const char* addr) {
    if (!s || !addr) return -1;
    for (int i = 0; i < DEVICE_SLOTS_MAX; ++i) {
        if (s->items[i].used && strcmp(s->items[i].addr, addr) == 0) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return -1;
}

int device_slots_upsert(device_slots_t* s, const char* addr, const char* path) {
    if (!s || !addr || !addr[0]) return -1;

    int idx = device_slots_find_by_addr(s, addr);
    if (idx < 0) {
        idx = alloc_slot(s);
        if (idx < 0) return -1;
        snprintf(s->items[idx].addr, sizeof(s->items[idx].addr), "%s", addr);
    }

    if (path && path[0]) {
        snprintf(s->items[idx].path, sizeof(s->items[idx].path), "%s", path);
    }
    return idx;
}

int device_slots_find_active(const device_slots_t* s) {
    if (!s) return -1;
    if (s->active_index >= 0 && s->active_index < DEVICE_SLOTS_MAX &&
        s->items[s->active_index].used &&
        s->items[s->active_index].active_processing) {
        return s->active_index;
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < DEVICE_SLOTS_MAX; ++i) {
        if (s->items[i].used && s->items[i].active_processing) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return -1;
}

int device_slots_set_pair_state(device_slots_t* s, const char* addr, int paired) {
    int idx = device_slots_upsert(s, addr, NULL);
    if (idx < 0) return -1;
    s->items[idx].paired = paired ? 1 : 0;
    return 0;
}

int device_slots_set_connected_state(device_slots_t* s, const char* addr, int connected) {
    int idx = device_slots_upsert(s, addr, NULL);
    if (idx < 0) return -1;
    s->items[idx].connected = connected ? 1 : 0;
    return 0;
}

int device_slots_set_profile_state(device_slots_t* s, const char* addr, int profile_connected) {
    int idx = device_slots_upsert(s, addr, NULL);
    if (idx < 0) return -1;
    s->items[idx].profile_connected = profile_connected ? 1 : 0;
    return 0;
}

int device_slots_set_trusted_state(device_slots_t* s, const char* addr, int trusted) {
    int idx = device_slots_upsert(s, addr, NULL);
    if (idx < 0) return -1;
    s->items[idx].trusted = trusted ? 1 : 0;
    return 0;
}

int device_slots_set_active(device_slots_t* s, const char* addr) {
    if (!s || !addr) return -1;

    int idx = device_slots_upsert(s, addr, NULL);
    if (idx < 0) return -1;

    for (int i = 0; i < DEVICE_SLOTS_MAX; ++i) {
        s->items[i].active_processing = 0;
    }

    s->items[idx].active_processing = 1;
    s->active_index = idx;
    return 0;
}

int device_slots_clear_active(device_slots_t* s) {
    if (!s) return -1;
    for (int i = 0; i < DEVICE_SLOTS_MAX; ++i) {
        s->items[i].active_processing = 0;
    }
    s->active_index = -1;
    return 0;
}

const char* device_slots_get_active_addr(const device_slots_t* s) {
    int idx = device_slots_find_active(s);
    if (idx < 0) return NULL;
    return s->items[idx].addr;
}

int device_slots_can_process_addr(const device_slots_t* s, const char* addr) {
    if (!s || !addr) return 0;
    int active = device_slots_find_active(s);
    if (active < 0) return 1;
    return strcmp(s->items[active].addr, addr) == 0;
}

int device_slots_format(const device_slots_t* s, char* out, int out_sz) {
    if (!s || !out || out_sz <= 0) return -1;

    int used = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < DEVICE_SLOTS_MAX; ++i) {
        if (!s->items[i].used) continue;

        int n = snprintf(out + used, (size_t)(out_sz - used),
                         "%s paired=%d trusted=%d connected=%d profile=%d active=%d path=%s\n",
                         s->items[i].addr,
                         s->items[i].paired,
                         s->items[i].trusted,
                         s->items[i].connected,
                         s->items[i].profile_connected,
                         s->items[i].active_processing,
                         s->items[i].path);
        if (n < 0) break;
        used += n;
        if (used >= out_sz - 1) break;
    }

    if (used == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "EMPTY");
    } else if (out[used - 1] == '\n') {
        out[used - 1] = 0;
    }
    return 0;
}

src/bluez_profile.c

C
#include "bluez_profile.h"
#include "log.h"

#include <gio/gunixfdlist.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <stdio.h>

struct bluez_profile {
    GDBusConnection* conn;
    char object_path[128];
    char uuid[64];
    char service_name[128];
    char service_record[4096];

    guint reg_id;
    GDBusNodeInfo* introspection;

    bluez_profile_connection_cb on_conn;
    bluez_profile_disconnection_cb on_disconn;
    void* cb_user;
};

static const gchar* profile_xml =
    "<node>"
    "  <interface name='org.bluez.Profile1'>"
    "    <method name='Release'/>"
    "    <method name='NewConnection'>"
    "      <arg type='o' name='device' direction='in'/>"
    "      <arg type='h' name='fd' direction='in'/>"
    "      <arg type='a{sv}' name='fd_properties' direction='in'/>"
    "    </method>"
    "    <method name='RequestDisconnection'>"
    "      <arg type='o' name='device' direction='in'/>"
    "    </method>"
    "  </interface>"
    "</node>";

static void on_method_call(GDBusConnection* conn,
                           const gchar* sender,
                           const gchar* object_path,
                           const gchar* interface_name,
                           const gchar* method_name,
                           GVariant* parameters,
                           GDBusMethodInvocation* invocation,
                           gpointer user_data) {
    (void)conn;
    (void)sender;
    (void)object_path;
    (void)interface_name;

    bluez_profile_t* p = (bluez_profile_t*)user_data;

    if (g_strcmp0(method_name, "Release") == 0) {
        log_info("Profile1.Release");
        g_dbus_method_invocation_return_value(invocation, NULL);
        return;
    }

    if (g_strcmp0(method_name, "NewConnection") == 0) {
        const char* device_path = NULL;
        gint32 handle_index = -1;
        GVariant* props = NULL;

        g_variant_get(parameters, "(&oha{sv})", &device_path, &handle_index, &props);

        unsigned int version = 0;
        unsigned int features = 0;

        GVariant* v = g_variant_lookup_value(props, "Version", G_VARIANT_TYPE_UINT16);
        if (v) {
            version = g_variant_get_uint16(v);
            g_variant_unref(v);
        }
        v = g_variant_lookup_value(props, "Features", G_VARIANT_TYPE_UINT16);
        if (v) {
            features = g_variant_get_uint16(v);
            g_variant_unref(v);
        }

        GUnixFDList* fd_list = g_dbus_message_get_unix_fd_list(
            g_dbus_method_invocation_get_message(invocation));
        int fd = -1;
        if (fd_list) {
            GError* err = NULL;
            fd = g_unix_fd_list_get(fd_list, handle_index, &err);
            if (fd < 0) {
                log_warn("Profile1.NewConnection fd get failed: %s", err ? err->message : "unknown");
                if (err) g_error_free(err);
            }
        }

        log_info("Profile1.NewConnection device=%s fd=%d version=%u features=%u",
                 device_path ? device_path : "",
                 fd, version, features);

        if (p->on_conn) {
            p->on_conn(device_path ? device_path : "", fd, version, features, p->cb_user);
        }

        if (props) g_variant_unref(props);
        g_dbus_method_invocation_return_value(invocation, NULL);
        return;
    }

    if (g_strcmp0(method_name, "RequestDisconnection") == 0) {
        const char* device_path = NULL;
        g_variant_get(parameters, "(&o)", &device_path);

        log_info("Profile1.RequestDisconnection device=%s", device_path ? device_path : "");

        if (p->on_disconn) {
            p->on_disconn(device_path ? device_path : "", p->cb_user);
        }

        g_dbus_method_invocation_return_value(invocation, NULL);
        return;
    }

    g_dbus_method_invocation_return_dbus_error(
        invocation,
        "org.bluez.Error.NotSupported",
        "Unsupported method");
}

static const GDBusInterfaceVTable profile_vtable = {
    on_method_call,
    NULL,
    NULL
};

bluez_profile_t* bluez_profile_create(GDBusConnection* conn,
                                      const char* object_path,
                                      const char* uuid,
                                      const char* service_record_xml,
                                      const char* service_name) {
    GError* err = NULL;
    bluez_profile_t* p = g_new0(bluez_profile_t, 1);
    if (!p) return NULL;

    p->conn = g_object_ref(conn);
    snprintf(p->object_path, sizeof(p->object_path), "%s",
             object_path ? object_path : "/bt_hfp_chatd/profile/hfp_ag");
    snprintf(p->uuid, sizeof(p->uuid), "%s",
             uuid ? uuid : "0000111f-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb");
    snprintf(p->service_name, sizeof(p->service_name), "%s",
             service_name ? service_name : "BT HFP AG");
    if (service_record_xml) {
        snprintf(p->service_record, sizeof(p->service_record), "%s", service_record_xml);
    }

    p->introspection = g_dbus_node_info_new_for_xml(profile_xml, &err);
    if (!p->introspection) {
        log_error("Profile introspection parse failed: %s", err ? err->message : "unknown");
        if (err) g_error_free(err);
        bluez_profile_destroy(p);
        return NULL;
    }

    return p;
}

void bluez_profile_destroy(bluez_profile_t* p) {
    if (!p) return;
    if (p->reg_id != 0) {
        g_dbus_connection_unregister_object(p->conn, p->reg_id);
    }
    if (p->introspection) {
        g_dbus_node_info_unref(p->introspection);
    }
    g_clear_object(&p->conn);
    g_free(p);
}

void bluez_profile_set_callbacks(bluez_profile_t* p,
                                 bluez_profile_connection_cb on_conn,
                                 bluez_profile_disconnection_cb on_disconn,
                                 void* user) {
    if (!p) return;
    p->on_conn = on_conn;
    p->on_disconn = on_disconn;
    p->cb_user = user;
}

int bluez_profile_register(bluez_profile_t* p) {
    if (!p || !p->introspection) return -1;

    GError* err = NULL;

    p->reg_id = g_dbus_connection_register_object(
        p->conn,
        p->object_path,
        p->introspection->interfaces[0],
        &profile_vtable,
        p,
        NULL,
        &err);

    if (p->reg_id == 0) {
        log_error("Profile object registration failed: %s", err ? err->message : "unknown");
        if (err) g_error_free(err);
        return -1;
    }

    GVariantBuilder opts;
    g_variant_builder_init(&opts, G_VARIANT_TYPE("a{sv}"));
    g_variant_builder_add(&opts, "{sv}", "Name", g_variant_new_string(p->service_name));
    g_variant_builder_add(&opts, "{sv}", "Role", g_variant_new_string("server"));
    g_variant_builder_add(&opts, "{sv}", "RequireAuthentication", g_variant_new_boolean(TRUE));
    g_variant_builder_add(&opts, "{sv}", "AutoConnect", g_variant_new_boolean(TRUE));
    g_variant_builder_add(&opts, "{sv}", "Version", g_variant_new_uint16(0x0107));
    g_variant_builder_add(&opts, "{sv}", "Features", g_variant_new_uint16(0x0009));

    if (p->service_record[0]) {
        g_variant_builder_add(&opts, "{sv}", "ServiceRecord",
                              g_variant_new_string(p->service_record));
    }

    GVariant* reply = g_dbus_connection_call_sync(
        p->conn,
        "org.bluez",
        "/org/bluez",
        "org.bluez.ProfileManager1",
        "RegisterProfile",
        g_variant_new("(osa{sv})", p->object_path, p->uuid, &opts),
        NULL,
        G_DBUS_CALL_FLAGS_NONE,
        -1,
        NULL,
        &err);

    if (!reply) {
        log_error("RegisterProfile failed: %s", err ? err->message : "unknown");
        if (err) g_error_free(err);
        return -1;
    }

    g_variant_unref(reply);
    log_info("Profile registered path=%s uuid=%s", p->object_path, p->uuid);
    return 0;
}

int bluez_profile_unregister(bluez_profile_t* p) {
    if (!p) return -1;

    GError* err = NULL;
    GVariant* reply = g_dbus_connection_call_sync(
        p->conn,
        "org.bluez",
        "/org/bluez",
        "org.bluez.ProfileManager1",
        "UnregisterProfile",
        g_variant_new("(o)", p->object_path),
        NULL,
        G_DBUS_CALL_FLAGS_NONE,
        -1,
        NULL,
        &err);

    if (!reply) {
        log_warn("UnregisterProfile failed: %s", err ? err->message : "unknown");
        if (err) g_error_free(err);
        return -1;
    }

    g_variant_unref(reply);
    return 0;
}

3) Update include/hfp_backend.h

Replace it with this:

C
#pragma once

typedef struct hfp_backend hfp_backend_t;

hfp_backend_t* hfp_backend_create(void);
void hfp_backend_destroy(hfp_backend_t* b);

int hfp_backend_bind_profile_fd(hfp_backend_t* b, const char* device_path, int fd);
int hfp_backend_unbind_profile_fd(hfp_backend_t* b, const char* device_path);

int hfp_backend_chat_start(hfp_backend_t* b, const char* remote_addr, char* out, int out_sz);
int hfp_backend_chat_stop(hfp_backend_t* b, char* out, int out_sz);

int hfp_backend_is_busy(const hfp_backend_t* b);
const char* hfp_backend_active_device_path(const hfp_backend_t* b);

4) Update src/hfp_backend.c

Replace it with this:

C
#include "hfp_backend.h"
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <stdio.h>
#include <unistd.h>

struct hfp_backend {
    int active;
    int service_fd;
    char active_addr[18];
    char active_device_path[128];
};

hfp_backend_t* hfp_backend_create(void) {
    hfp_backend_t* b = (hfp_backend_t*)calloc(1, sizeof(*b));
    if (!b) return NULL;
    b->service_fd = -1;
    return b;
}

void hfp_backend_destroy(hfp_backend_t* b) {
    if (!b) return;
    if (b->service_fd >= 0) {
        close(b->service_fd);
    }
    free(b);
}

int hfp_backend_bind_profile_fd(hfp_backend_t* b, const char* device_path, int fd) {
    if (!b || fd < 0) return -1;

    if (b->service_fd >= 0 && b->service_fd != fd) {
        close(b->service_fd);
    }

    b->service_fd = fd;
    snprintf(b->active_device_path, sizeof(b->active_device_path), "%s", device_path ? device_path : "");
    return 0;
}

int hfp_backend_unbind_profile_fd(hfp_backend_t* b, const char* device_path) {
    (void)device_path;
    if (!b) return -1;

    if (b->service_fd >= 0) {
        close(b->service_fd);
        b->service_fd = -1;
    }

    b->active = 0;
    b->active_addr[0] = 0;
    b->active_device_path[0] = 0;
    return 0;
}

int hfp_backend_chat_start(hfp_backend_t* b, const char* remote_addr, char* out, int out_sz) {
    if (!b || !out || out_sz <= 0) return -1;

    if (b->active) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "BUSY active=%s", b->active_addr[0] ? b->active_addr : "(unknown)");
        return -1;
    }

    if (b->service_fd < 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR no_hfp_service_connection");
        return -1;
    }

    snprintf(b->active_addr, sizeof(b->active_addr), "%s", remote_addr ? remote_addr : "");
    b->active = 1;

    /*
     * Honest boundary:
     * We now have the service-level HFP profile connection fd from BlueZ Profile1.NewConnection.
     * Real SCO/audio call processing still requires additional HFP backend work.
     */
    snprintf(out, out_sz, "NOT_IMPL hfp_service_connected audio_backend_pending addr=%s",
             b->active_addr[0] ? b->active_addr : "(unknown)");
    return -1;
}

int hfp_backend_chat_stop(hfp_backend_t* b, char* out, int out_sz) {
    if (!b || !out || out_sz <= 0) return -1;

    b->active = 0;
    b->active_addr[0] = 0;

    snprintf(out, out_sz, "OK");
    return 0;
}

int hfp_backend_is_busy(const hfp_backend_t* b) {
    return b ? b->active : 0;
}

const char* hfp_backend_active_device_path(const hfp_backend_t* b) {
    return b ? b->active_device_path : NULL;
}

5) Update include/bluez_manager.h

Add these declarations:

C
int bluez_manager_connect_profile(bluez_manager_t* m, const char* addr, const char* uuid);
int bluez_manager_disconnect_profile(bluez_manager_t* m, const char* addr, const char* uuid);

6) Update src/bluez_manager.c

Add these functions near the bottom:

C
int bluez_manager_connect_profile(bluez_manager_t* m, const char* addr, const char* uuid) {
    if (!m || !addr || !uuid) return -1;

    char path[128];
    bluez_manager_address_to_device_path(addr, path, sizeof(path));

    GError* err = NULL;
    GVariant* reply = g_dbus_connection_call_sync(
        m->conn,
        "org.bluez",
        path,
        "org.bluez.Device1",
        "ConnectProfile",
        g_variant_new("(s)", uuid),
        NULL,
        G_DBUS_CALL_FLAGS_NONE,
        -1,
        NULL,
        &err);

    if (!reply) {
        log_warn("ConnectProfile(%s) failed: %s", uuid, err ? err->message : "unknown");
        if (err) g_error_free(err);
        return -1;
    }

    g_variant_unref(reply);
    return 0;
}

int bluez_manager_disconnect_profile(bluez_manager_t* m, const char* addr, const char* uuid) {
    if (!m || !addr || !uuid) return -1;

    char path[128];
    bluez_manager_address_to_device_path(addr, path, sizeof(path));

    GError* err = NULL;
    GVariant* reply = g_dbus_connection_call_sync(
        m->conn,
        "org.bluez",
        path,
        "org.bluez.Device1",
        "DisconnectProfile",
        g_variant_new("(s)", uuid),
        NULL,
        G_DBUS_CALL_FLAGS_NONE,
        -1,
        NULL,
        &err);

    if (!reply) {
        log_warn("DisconnectProfile(%s) failed: %s", uuid, err ? err->message : "unknown");
        if (err) g_error_free(err);
        return -1;
    }

    g_variant_unref(reply);
    return 0;
}

7) Update include/app.h

Replace it with:

C
#pragma once
#include <gio/gio.h>
#include "bluez_agent.h"
#include "bluez_manager.h"
#include "bluez_profile.h"
#include "ctrl_server.h"
#include "device_slots.h"
#include "hfp_backend.h"
#include "map_mse.h"

typedef struct app {
    GMainLoop* loop;
    GDBusConnection* bus;
    bluez_agent_t* agent;
    bluez_manager_t* bluez;
    bluez_profile_t* hfp_profile;
    ctrl_server_t* ctrl;
    hfp_backend_t* hfp;
    map_mse_t* map;
    device_slots_t slots;
    char last_device_addr[18];
} app_t;

app_t* app_create(void);
void app_destroy(app_t* a);

int app_start(app_t* a);
int app_handle_command(const char* cmd, char* out, int out_sz, void* user);

8) Update src/app.c

Replace it with this version:

C
#include "app.h"
#include "map_sdp.h"
#include "log.h"
#include <string.h>
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>

#define HFP_AG_UUID "0000111f-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb"

static const char* path_to_addr(const char* device_path, char* out, int out_sz) {
    if (!device_path || !out || out_sz <= 0) return NULL;

    const char* p = strstr(device_path, "/dev_");
    if (!p) return NULL;
    p += 5;

    int j = 0;
    while (*p && j < out_sz - 1) {
        out[j++] = (*p == '_') ? ':' : *p;
        ++p;
    }
    out[j] = 0;
    return out;
}

static void on_device_event(const char* addr, const char* path, int connected, int paired, void* user) {
    app_t* a = (app_t*) user;
    if (!a || !addr || !addr[0]) return;

    snprintf(a->last_device_addr, sizeof(a->last_device_addr), "%s", addr);

    device_slots_upsert(&a->slots, addr, path);
    device_slots_set_pair_state(&a->slots, addr, paired);
    device_slots_set_connected_state(&a->slots, addr, connected);

    log_info("Device event: addr=%s path=%s connected=%d paired=%d",
             addr, path ? path : "", connected, paired);
}

static void on_profile_connection(const char* device_path,
                                  int fd,
                                  unsigned int version,
                                  unsigned int features,
                                  void* user) {
    (void)version;
    (void)features;

    app_t* a = (app_t*) user;
    if (!a) return;

    char addr[18] = {0};
    if (path_to_addr(device_path, addr, sizeof(addr))) {
        device_slots_upsert(&a->slots, addr, device_path);
        device_slots_set_profile_state(&a->slots, addr, 1);

        if (device_slots_find_active(&a->slots) < 0) {
            device_slots_set_active(&a->slots, addr);
        }
    }

    hfp_backend_bind_profile_fd(a->hfp, device_path, fd);

    log_info("HFP profile connected path=%s fd=%d", device_path ? device_path : "", fd);
}

static void on_profile_disconnection(const char* device_path, void* user) {
    app_t* a = (app_t*) user;
    if (!a) return;

    char addr[18] = {0};
    if (path_to_addr(device_path, addr, sizeof(addr))) {
        device_slots_set_profile_state(&a->slots, addr, 0);

        const char* active = device_slots_get_active_addr(&a->slots);
        if (active && strcmp(active, addr) == 0) {
            device_slots_clear_active(&a->slots);
        }
    }

    hfp_backend_unbind_profile_fd(a->hfp, device_path);
    log_info("HFP profile disconnected path=%s", device_path ? device_path : "");
}

static void build_hfp_ag_service_record(char* out, int out_sz) {
    snprintf(out, out_sz,
        "<record>"
        "  <attribute id=\"0x0001\">"
        "    <sequence><uuid value=\"0x111F\"/></sequence>"
        "  </attribute>"
        "  <attribute id=\"0x0004\">"
        "    <sequence>"
        "      <sequence><uuid value=\"0x0100\"/><uint8 value=\"0x0D\"/></sequence>"
        "    </sequence>"
        "  </attribute>"
        "  <attribute id=\"0x0009\">"
        "    <sequence><sequence><uuid value=\"0x111F\"/><uint16 value=\"0x0107\"/></sequence></sequence>"
        "  </attribute>"
        "  <attribute id=\"0x0100\"><text value=\"BT HFP AG\"/></attribute>"
        "  <attribute id=\"0x0311\"><uint16 value=\"0x0009\"/></attribute>"
        "</record>");
}

app_t* app_create(void) {
    app_t* a = g_new0(app_t, 1);
    if (!a) return NULL;

    device_slots_init(&a->slots);

    GError* err = NULL;
    a->bus = g_bus_get_sync(G_BUS_TYPE_SYSTEM, NULL, &err);
    if (!a->bus) {
        log_error("System bus connect failed: %s", err ? err->message : "unknown");
        if (err) g_error_free(err);
        app_destroy(a);
        return NULL;
    }

    a->loop = g_main_loop_new(NULL, FALSE);
    a->agent = bluez_agent_create(a->bus, "/bt_hfp_chatd/agent");
    a->bluez = bluez_manager_create(a->bus);
    a->ctrl = ctrl_server_create("/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock", app_handle_command, a);
    a->hfp = hfp_backend_create();
    a->map = map_mse_create();

    char service_record[4096];
    build_hfp_ag_service_record(service_record, sizeof(service_record));
    a->hfp_profile = bluez_profile_create(
        a->bus,
        "/bt_hfp_chatd/profile/hfp_ag",
        HFP_AG_UUID,
        service_record,
        "BT HFP AG");

    if (!a->loop || !a->agent || !a->bluez || !a->ctrl || !a->hfp || !a->map || !a->hfp_profile) {
        app_destroy(a);
        return NULL;
    }

    bluez_manager_set_device_event_cb(a->bluez, on_device_event, a);
    bluez_profile_set_callbacks(a->hfp_profile, on_profile_connection, on_profile_disconnection, a);

    return a;
}

void app_destroy(app_t* a) {
    if (!a) return;

    if (a->agent) {
        bluez_agent_unregister(a->agent);
    }
    if (a->hfp_profile) {
        bluez_profile_unregister(a->hfp_profile);
    }

    if (a->ctrl) ctrl_server_destroy(a->ctrl);
    if (a->bluez) bluez_manager_destroy(a->bluez);
    if (a->agent) bluez_agent_destroy(a->agent);
    if (a->hfp_profile) bluez_profile_destroy(a->hfp_profile);
    if (a->hfp) hfp_backend_destroy(a->hfp);
    if (a->map) map_mse_destroy(a->map);
    if (a->loop) g_main_loop_unref(a->loop);
    if (a->bus) g_object_unref(a->bus);

    g_free(a);
}

int app_start(app_t* a) {
    if (!a) return -1;

    if (bluez_manager_start(a->bluez) < 0) {
        return -1;
    }

    if (bluez_agent_register(a->agent) < 0) {
        log_warn("Agent registration failed; pairing may not work");
    }

    if (bluez_profile_register(a->hfp_profile) < 0) {
        log_warn("HFP AG profile registration failed");
    }

    if (bluez_manager_power_on_default_adapter(a->bluez) < 0) {
        log_warn("Adapter power-on failed");
    }

    if (ctrl_server_start(a->ctrl) < 0) {
        return -1;
    }

    log_info("Application started");
    return 0;
}

static int parse_addr_arg(const char* cmd, const char* prefix, char* out_addr, int out_addr_sz) {
    if (!cmd || !prefix || !out_addr || out_addr_sz <= 0) return -1;
    if (strncmp(cmd, prefix, strlen(prefix)) != 0) return -1;
    const char* p = cmd + strlen(prefix);
    while (*p == ' ') p++;
    if (*p == 0) return -1;
    snprintf(out_addr, (size_t)out_addr_sz, "%s", p);
    return 0;
}

int app_handle_command(const char* cmd, char* out, int out_sz, void* user) {
    app_t* a = (app_t*) user;
    if (!a || !cmd || !out || out_sz <= 0) return -1;

    if (strcmp(cmd, "PING") == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "PONG");
        return 0;
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "SCAN_START") == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, bluez_manager_start_discovery(a->bluez) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "SCAN_STOP") == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, bluez_manager_stop_discovery(a->bluez) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "DEVICES") == 0) {
        return bluez_manager_list_devices(a->bluez, out, out_sz);
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "PAIRED_LIST") == 0) {
        return device_slots_format(&a->slots, out, out_sz);
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "ACTIVE_GET") == 0) {
        const char* active = device_slots_get_active_addr(&a->slots);
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "%s", active ? active : "EMPTY");
        return 0;
    }

    char addr[64];

    if (parse_addr_arg(cmd, "ACTIVE_SET ", addr, sizeof(addr)) == 0) {
        if (hfp_backend_is_busy(a->hfp)) {
            const char* active = device_slots_get_active_addr(&a->slots);
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "BUSY active=%s", active ? active : "(unknown)");
            return -1;
        }
        snprintf(out, out_sz, device_slots_set_active(&a->slots, addr) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (parse_addr_arg(cmd, "PAIR ", addr, sizeof(addr)) == 0) {
        int rc = 0;
        rc |= bluez_manager_trust_device(a->bluez, addr);
        rc |= bluez_manager_pair_device(a->bluez, addr);
        device_slots_upsert(&a->slots, addr, NULL);
        device_slots_set_trusted_state(&a->slots, addr, 1);
        snprintf(out, out_sz, rc == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (parse_addr_arg(cmd, "CONNECT ", addr, sizeof(addr)) == 0) {
        int rc = 0;
        rc |= bluez_manager_trust_device(a->bluez, addr);
        rc |= bluez_manager_connect_device(a->bluez, addr);
        device_slots_upsert(&a->slots, addr, NULL);
        device_slots_set_trusted_state(&a->slots, addr, 1);
        snprintf(out, out_sz, rc == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (parse_addr_arg(cmd, "DISCONNECT ", addr, sizeof(addr)) == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, bluez_manager_disconnect_device(a->bluez, addr) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (parse_addr_arg(cmd, "HFP_CONNECT ", addr, sizeof(addr)) == 0) {
        if (!device_slots_can_process_addr(&a->slots, addr)) {
            const char* active = device_slots_get_active_addr(&a->slots);
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "BUSY active=%s", active ? active : "(unknown)");
            return -1;
        }
        device_slots_set_active(&a->slots, addr);
        snprintf(out, out_sz, bluez_manager_connect_profile(a->bluez, addr, HFP_AG_UUID) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (parse_addr_arg(cmd, "HFP_DISCONNECT ", addr, sizeof(addr)) == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, bluez_manager_disconnect_profile(a->bluez, addr, HFP_AG_UUID) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (strncmp(cmd, "CHAT_START", 10) == 0) {
        const char* use_addr = NULL;

        if (cmd[10] == ' ') {
            const char* p = cmd + 11;
            while (*p == ' ') p++;
            if (*p) use_addr = p;
        }

        if (!use_addr) {
            use_addr = device_slots_get_active_addr(&a->slots);
        }
        if (!use_addr) {
            use_addr = a->last_device_addr[0] ? a->last_device_addr : NULL;
        }
        if (!use_addr) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR no_target_device");
            return -1;
        }

        if (!device_slots_can_process_addr(&a->slots, use_addr)) {
            const char* active = device_slots_get_active_addr(&a->slots);
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "BUSY active=%s", active ? active : "(unknown)");
            return -1;
        }

        device_slots_set_active(&a->slots, use_addr);
        return hfp_backend_chat_start(a->hfp, use_addr, out, out_sz);
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "CHAT_STOP") == 0) {
        int rc = hfp_backend_chat_stop(a->hfp, out, out_sz);
        device_slots_clear_active(&a->slots);
        return rc;
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "MAP_STATUS") == 0) {
        return map_mse_status(a->map, out, out_sz);
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "MSG_LIST") == 0) {
        return map_mse_msg_list(a->map, out, out_sz);
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "MSG_CLEAR") == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, map_mse_msg_clear(a->map) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (strncmp(cmd, "MSG_NOTIFY ", 11) == 0) {
        const char* p = cmd + 11;
        while (*p == ' ') p++;
        if (strcmp(p, "ON") == 0) {
            map_mse_notify_set(a->map, 1);
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "OK");
            return 0;
        }
        if (strcmp(p, "OFF") == 0) {
            map_mse_notify_set(a->map, 0);
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "OK");
            return 0;
        }
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
        return -1;
    }

    if (strncmp(cmd, "MSG_SEND ", 9) == 0) {
        const char* p = cmd + 9;
        while (*p == ' ') p++;
        const char* sp = strchr(p, ' ');
        if (!sp) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }

        char msg_addr[32];
        size_t n = (size_t)(sp - p);
        if (n >= sizeof(msg_addr)) n = sizeof(msg_addr) - 1;
        memcpy(msg_addr, p, n);
        msg_addr[n] = 0;

        const char* text = sp + 1;
        while (*text == ' ') text++;
        if (*text == 0) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }

        uint32_t id = 0;
        if (map_mse_msg_send(a->map, msg_addr, text, &id) == 0) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "OK id=%u", id);
            return 0;
        }
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
        return -1;
    }

    if (strncmp(cmd, "MSG_INJECT_RX ", 14) == 0) {
        const char* p = cmd + 14;
        while (*p == ' ') p++;
        const char* sp = strchr(p, ' ');
        if (!sp) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }

        char msg_addr[32];
        size_t n = (size_t)(sp - p);
        if (n >= sizeof(msg_addr)) n = sizeof(msg_addr) - 1;
        memcpy(msg_addr, p, n);
        msg_addr[n] = 0;

        const char* text = sp + 1;
        while (*text == ' ') text++;
        if (*text == 0) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }

        uint32_t id = 0;
        if (map_mse_inject_rx(a->map, msg_addr, text, &id) == 0) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "OK id=%u", id);
            return 0;
        }
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
        return -1;
    }

    if (strncmp(cmd, "MSG_MARK_READ ", 14) == 0) {
        uint32_t id = 0;
        int v = 0;
        if (sscanf(cmd + 14, "%u %d", &id, &v) != 2) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }
        snprintf(out, out_sz, map_mse_mark_read(a->map, id, v) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (strncmp(cmd, "MSG_DELIVERY ", 13) == 0) {
        uint32_t id = 0;
        int v = 0;
        if (sscanf(cmd + 13, "%u %d", &id, &v) != 2) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }
        snprintf(out, out_sz, map_mse_delivery(a->map, id, v) == 0 ? "OK" : "ERR");
        return 0;
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "MSG_EVENTS") == 0) {
        return map_mse_events(a->map, out, out_sz);
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "MAP_SDP_XML") == 0) {
        return map_sdp_build_mas_record_xml(out, out_sz, 1, "MAP Message Access", 1);
    }

    if (strcmp(cmd, "LAST_DEVICE") == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "%s", a->last_device_addr[0] ? a->last_device_addr : "EMPTY");
        return 0;
    }

    snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR unknown_command");
    return -1;
}

9) Update Makefile

Add these sources to SRCS:

Makefile
	$(SRC_DIR)/bluez_profile.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/device_slots.c \

So the full SRCS block becomes:

Makefile
SRCS := \
	$(SRC_DIR)/main.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/app.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/bluez_agent.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/bluez_manager.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/bluez_profile.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/ctrl_server.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/device_slots.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/hfp_backend.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/map_mns.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/map_mse.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/map_sdp.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/msg_store.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/log.c

10) New commands you now have

For multi-pairing / one processing at a time:

Bash
printf "PAIR AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "PAIR 11:22:33:44:55:66\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock

printf "PAIRED_LIST\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "ACTIVE_GET\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "ACTIVE_SET AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock

printf "HFP_CONNECT AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "CHAT_START AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock
printf "CHAT_STOP\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock

Behavior:

  • many devices can exist in PAIRED_LIST

  • only one can be active

  • trying to process another while one is active returns BUSY active=<addr>

11) Honest status after this update

What is now real:

  • BlueZ agent registration

  • BlueZ HFP AG profile registration through ProfileManager1

  • Profile1.NewConnection / RequestDisconnection

  • service-level profile FD handoff into your backend layer

  • multi-paired device tracking

  • single active processing policy

What is still not fully done:

  • SCO audio establishment and audio streaming

  • AT-command/session handling over the HFP service-level connection

  • full call-state logic

  • end-to-end headset interoperability testing

That boundary follows BlueZ’s actual D-Bus design: RegisterProfile/Profile1 gives you the service-level profile plumbing and callbacks, while the full voice backend is still something you must implement on top of that. GitHub+2Debian Manpages+2

Next, I should add the AT command parser + HFP AG state machine on top of the Profile1 fd, because that is the direct next layer before SCO/audio.


You said:
I want to add sms send feature in this project

ChatGPT said:

I’m checking the real BlueZ/obexd interfaces for Bluetooth messaging first so I can add SMS sending in a way that matches what BlueZ actually exposes rather than inventing an API.

Yes. For the BlueZ + D-Bus project, the correct way to add real Bluetooth SMS sending is to use BlueZ OBEX as a MAP client:

  • create an OBEX session with org.bluez.obex.Client1.CreateSession using Target="map" ManKier+1

  • use org.bluez.obex.MessageAccess1.PushMessage(...) to send a message in bMessage format Ubuntu Manpages

  • the remote device must actually support MAP message types such as SMS_GSM or SMS_CDMA, exposed through SupportedTypes on MessageAccess1 Ubuntu Manpages

So below I’m adding a real SMS send path on top of your current project, while staying honest:

  • this is a real OBEX/MAP send path

  • it depends on org.bluez.obex / obexd being available

  • it depends on the remote phone/headset exposing MAP MAS

  • it does not guarantee every headset will accept SMS sending, because many smart headsets do not expose a writable MAP server even if they can display notifications Ubuntu Manpages

1) Add new files

include/obex_map_client.h

C
#pragma once
#include <gio/gio.h>

typedef struct obex_map_client obex_map_client_t;

obex_map_client_t* obex_map_client_create(void);
void obex_map_client_destroy(obex_map_client_t* c);

int obex_map_client_send_sms(obex_map_client_t* c,
                             const char* remote_bt_addr,
                             const char* recipient,
                             const char* text,
                             char* out,
                             int out_sz);

src/obex_map_client.c

C
#include "obex_map_client.h"
#include "log.h"

#include <glib.h>
#include <gio/gio.h>
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <unistd.h>

struct obex_map_client {
    GDBusConnection* bus;
};

static int write_text_file(const char* path, const char* text) {
    FILE* fp = fopen(path, "wb");
    if (!fp) return -1;
    size_t n = fwrite(text, 1, strlen(text), fp);
    fclose(fp);
    return (n == strlen(text)) ? 0 : -1;
}

static void escape_bmessage_text(const char* in, char* out, int out_sz) {
    int w = 0;
    if (!in || !out || out_sz <= 0) return;

    for (const char* p = in; *p && w < out_sz - 1; ++p) {
        if (*p == '\r') {
            continue;
        }
        if (*p == '\n') {
            if (w < out_sz - 2) {
                out[w++] = '\r';
                out[w++] = '\n';
            } else {
                break;
            }
            continue;
        }
        out[w++] = *p;
    }
    out[w] = 0;
}

static int build_bmessage_sms(const char* recipient, const char* text, char* out, int out_sz) {
    char body[1024];
    if (!recipient || !text || !out || out_sz <= 0) return -1;

    escape_bmessage_text(text, body, sizeof(body));

    int n = snprintf(
        out,
        out_sz,
        "BEGIN:BMSG\r\n"
        "VERSION:1.0\r\n"
        "STATUS:UNREAD\r\n"
        "TYPE:SMS_GSM\r\n"
        "FOLDER:telecom/msg/outbox\r\n"
        "BEGIN:BENV\r\n"
        "BEGIN:VCARD\r\n"
        "VERSION:2.1\r\n"
        "TEL:%s\r\n"
        "END:VCARD\r\n"
        "BEGIN:BBODY\r\n"
        "CHARSET:UTF-8\r\n"
        "LENGTH:%zu\r\n"
        "BEGIN:MSG\r\n"
        "%s\r\n"
        "END:MSG\r\n"
        "END:BBODY\r\n"
        "END:BENV\r\n"
        "END:BMSG\r\n",
        recipient,
        strlen(body),
        body
    );

    return (n > 0 && n < out_sz) ? 0 : -1;
}

static int obex_create_map_session(GDBusConnection* bus,
                                   const char* remote_bt_addr,
                                   char* session_path,
                                   int session_path_sz) {
    GError* err = NULL;
    GVariantBuilder args;
    GVariant* reply;
    const char* path = NULL;

    if (!bus || !remote_bt_addr || !session_path || session_path_sz <= 0) return -1;

    g_variant_builder_init(&args, G_VARIANT_TYPE("a{sv}"));
    g_variant_builder_add(&args, "{sv}", "Target", g_variant_new_string("map"));

    reply = g_dbus_connection_call_sync(
        bus,
        "org.bluez.obex",
        "/org/bluez/obex",
        "org.bluez.obex.Client1",
        "CreateSession",
        g_variant_new("(sa{sv})", remote_bt_addr, &args),
        G_VARIANT_TYPE("(o)"),
        G_DBUS_CALL_FLAGS_NONE,
        -1,
        NULL,
        &err
    );

    if (!reply) {
        log_warn("CreateSession(map) failed: %s", err ? err->message : "unknown");
        if (err) g_error_free(err);
        return -1;
    }

    g_variant_get(reply, "(&o)", &path);
    snprintf(session_path, (size_t)session_path_sz, "%s", path ? path : "");
    g_variant_unref(reply);

    return session_path[0] ? 0 : -1;
}

static int obex_remove_session(GDBusConnection* bus, const char* session_path) {
    GError* err = NULL;
    GVariant* reply;

    if (!bus || !session_path || !session_path[0]) return -1;

    reply = g_dbus_connection_call_sync(
        bus,
        "org.bluez.obex",
        "/org/bluez/obex",
        "org.bluez.obex.Client1",
        "RemoveSession",
        g_variant_new("(o)", session_path),
        NULL,
        G_DBUS_CALL_FLAGS_NONE,
        -1,
        NULL,
        &err
    );

    if (!reply) {
        log_warn("RemoveSession failed: %s", err ? err->message : "unknown");
        if (err) g_error_free(err);
        return -1;
    }

    g_variant_unref(reply);
    return 0;
}

static int obex_get_supported_types(GDBusConnection* bus,
                                    const char* session_path,
                                    char* out,
                                    int out_sz) {
    GError* err = NULL;
    GVariant* reply = NULL;
    GVariant* inner = NULL;
    GVariantIter iter;
    const char* s = NULL;
    int used = 0;

    if (!bus || !session_path || !out || out_sz <= 0) return -1;
    out[0] = 0;

    reply = g_dbus_connection_call_sync(
        bus,
        "org.bluez.obex",
        session_path,
        "org.freedesktop.DBus.Properties",
        "Get",
        g_variant_new("(ss)", "org.bluez.obex.MessageAccess1", "SupportedTypes"),
        G_VARIANT_TYPE("(v)"),
        G_DBUS_CALL_FLAGS_NONE,
        -1,
        NULL,
        &err
    );

    if (!reply) {
        log_warn("Get SupportedTypes failed: %s", err ? err->message : "unknown");
        if (err) g_error_free(err);
        return -1;
    }

    g_variant_get(reply, "(v)", &inner);
    g_variant_iter_init(&iter, inner);

    while (g_variant_iter_next(&iter, "&s", &s)) {
        int n = snprintf(out + used, (size_t)(out_sz - used), "%s%s", used ? "," : "", s);
        if (n < 0) break;
        used += n;
        if (used >= out_sz - 1) break;
    }

    g_variant_unref(inner);
    g_variant_unref(reply);
    return 0;
}

static int obex_push_message(GDBusConnection* bus,
                             const char* session_path,
                             const char* sourcefile,
                             char* transfer_path,
                             int transfer_path_sz) {
    GError* err = NULL;
    GVariantBuilder dict;
    GVariant* reply = NULL;
    const char* obj = NULL;
    GVariant* props = NULL;

    if (!bus || !session_path || !sourcefile || !transfer_path || transfer_path_sz <= 0) return -1;

    g_variant_builder_init(&dict, G_VARIANT_TYPE("a{sv}"));
    g_variant_builder_add(&dict, "{sv}", "Transparent", g_variant_new_boolean(FALSE));
    g_variant_builder_add(&dict, "{sv}", "Retry", g_variant_new_boolean(TRUE));
    g_variant_builder_add(&dict, "{sv}", "Charset", g_variant_new_string("UTF-8"));

    reply = g_dbus_connection_call_sync(
        bus,
        "org.bluez.obex",
        session_path,
        "org.bluez.obex.MessageAccess1",
        "PushMessage",
        g_variant_new("(ssa{sv})", sourcefile, "outbox", &dict),
        NULL,
        G_DBUS_CALL_FLAGS_NONE,
        -1,
        NULL,
        &err
    );

    if (!reply) {
        log_warn("PushMessage failed: %s", err ? err->message : "unknown");
        if (err) g_error_free(err);
        return -1;
    }

    g_variant_get(reply, "(&o@a{sv})", &obj, &props);
    snprintf(transfer_path, (size_t)transfer_path_sz, "%s", obj ? obj : "");

    if (props) g_variant_unref(props);
    g_variant_unref(reply);
    return transfer_path[0] ? 0 : -1;
}

static int obex_wait_transfer_complete(GDBusConnection* bus,
                                       const char* transfer_path,
                                       char* status_out,
                                       int status_out_sz) {
    GError* err = NULL;
    int tries = 100;

    if (!bus || !transfer_path || !status_out || status_out_sz <= 0) return -1;

    while (tries-- > 0) {
        GVariant* reply = g_dbus_connection_call_sync(
            bus,
            "org.bluez.obex",
            transfer_path,
            "org.freedesktop.DBus.Properties",
            "Get",
            g_variant_new("(ss)", "org.bluez.obex.Transfer1", "Status"),
            G_VARIANT_TYPE("(v)"),
            G_DBUS_CALL_FLAGS_NONE,
            -1,
            NULL,
            &err
        );

        if (!reply) {
            log_warn("Transfer status get failed: %s", err ? err->message : "unknown");
            if (err) g_error_free(err);
            return -1;
        }

        GVariant* inner = NULL;
        const char* status = NULL;
        g_variant_get(reply, "(v)", &inner);
        status = g_variant_get_string(inner, NULL);

        snprintf(status_out, (size_t)status_out_sz, "%s", status ? status : "");

        g_variant_unref(inner);
        g_variant_unref(reply);

        if (strcmp(status_out, "complete") == 0) {
            return 0;
        }
        if (strcmp(status_out, "error") == 0) {
            return -1;
        }

        usleep(200 * 1000);
    }

    snprintf(status_out, (size_t)status_out_sz, "timeout");
    return -1;
}

obex_map_client_t* obex_map_client_create(void) {
    GError* err = NULL;
    obex_map_client_t* c = (obex_map_client_t*)calloc(1, sizeof(*c));
    if (!c) return NULL;

    c->bus = g_bus_get_sync(G_BUS_TYPE_SESSION, NULL, &err);
    if (!c->bus) {
        /*
         * Some setups expose org.bluez.obex on the session bus, not system bus.
         * This is the common obexd deployment path.
         */
        if (err) {
            log_warn("Session bus connect failed for obexd: %s", err->message);
            g_error_free(err);
        }
        free(c);
        return NULL;
    }

    return c;
}

void obex_map_client_destroy(obex_map_client_t* c) {
    if (!c) return;
    if (c->bus) g_object_unref(c->bus);
    free(c);
}

int obex_map_client_send_sms(obex_map_client_t* c,
                             const char* remote_bt_addr,
                             const char* recipient,
                             const char* text,
                             char* out,
                             int out_sz) {
    char session_path[256] = {0};
    char transfer_path[256] = {0};
    char supported[256] = {0};
    char tmp_path[256] = {0};
    char bmsg[2048];
    char transfer_status[64] = {0};
    int rc = -1;

    if (!c || !remote_bt_addr || !recipient || !text || !out || out_sz <= 0) return -1;
    out[0] = 0;

    if (build_bmessage_sms(recipient, text, bmsg, sizeof(bmsg)) < 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR bmessage_build_failed");
        return -1;
    }

    if (obex_create_map_session(c->bus, remote_bt_addr, session_path, sizeof(session_path)) < 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR create_map_session_failed");
        return -1;
    }

    obex_get_supported_types(c->bus, session_path, supported, sizeof(supported));

    if (supported[0] &&
        !strstr(supported, "SMS_GSM") &&
        !strstr(supported, "SMS_CDMA")) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR unsupported_types=%s", supported);
        goto done;
    }

    snprintf(tmp_path, sizeof(tmp_path), "/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd_sms_%d.bmsg", getpid());
    if (write_text_file(tmp_path, bmsg) < 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR temp_bmsg_write_failed");
        goto done;
    }

    if (obex_push_message(c->bus, session_path, tmp_path, transfer_path, sizeof(transfer_path)) < 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR push_message_failed");
        unlink(tmp_path);
        goto done;
    }

    unlink(tmp_path);

    if (obex_wait_transfer_complete(c->bus, transfer_path, transfer_status, sizeof(transfer_status)) == 0) {
        snprintf(out, out_sz, "OK transfer=%s status=%s types=%s",
                 transfer_path,
                 transfer_status[0] ? transfer_status : "complete",
                 supported[0] ? supported : "unknown");
        rc = 0;
        goto done;
    }

    snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR transfer=%s status=%s types=%s",
             transfer_path,
             transfer_status[0] ? transfer_status : "unknown",
             supported[0] ? supported : "unknown");

done:
    obex_remove_session(c->bus, session_path);
    return rc;
}

2) Update include/app.h

Add:

C
#include "obex_map_client.h"

and inside app_t add:

C
    obex_map_client_t* obex_map;

So the relevant part becomes:

C
typedef struct app {
    GMainLoop* loop;
    GDBusConnection* bus;
    bluez_agent_t* agent;
    bluez_manager_t* bluez;
    bluez_profile_t* hfp_profile;
    ctrl_server_t* ctrl;
    hfp_backend_t* hfp;
    map_mse_t* map;
    obex_map_client_t* obex_map;
    device_slots_t slots;
    char last_device_addr[18];
} app_t;

3) Update src/app.c

In app_create(), add:

C
    a->obex_map = obex_map_client_create();

and update the allocation check:

C
    if (!a->loop || !a->agent || !a->bluez || !a->ctrl || !a->hfp || !a->map || !a->hfp_profile) {

Keep that check as-is if you want OBEX SMS to be optional. That is better. Then add:

C
    if (!a->obex_map) {
        log_warn("OBEX MAP client init failed; real SMS send disabled");
    }

In app_destroy(), add:

C
    if (a->obex_map) obex_map_client_destroy(a->obex_map);

In app_handle_command(...), add this command block before the final unknown-command case:

C
    /*
     * SMS_SEND <remote_bt_addr> <recipient> <text...>
     *
     * remote_bt_addr = Bluetooth address of the remote MAP server device
     * recipient      = phone number / recipient string inside bMessage
     * text           = SMS text
     */
    if (strncmp(cmd, "SMS_SEND ", 9) == 0) {
        if (!a->obex_map) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR obex_map_unavailable");
            return -1;
        }

        const char* p = cmd + 9;
        while (*p == ' ') p++;

        const char* sp1 = strchr(p, ' ');
        if (!sp1) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }

        char bt_addr[32];
        size_t n1 = (size_t)(sp1 - p);
        if (n1 >= sizeof(bt_addr)) n1 = sizeof(bt_addr) - 1;
        memcpy(bt_addr, p, n1);
        bt_addr[n1] = 0;

        const char* p2 = sp1 + 1;
        while (*p2 == ' ') p2++;

        const char* sp2 = strchr(p2, ' ');
        if (!sp2) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }

        char recipient[64];
        size_t n2 = (size_t)(sp2 - p2);
        if (n2 >= sizeof(recipient)) n2 = sizeof(recipient) - 1;
        memcpy(recipient, p2, n2);
        recipient[n2] = 0;

        const char* text = sp2 + 1;
        while (*text == ' ') text++;
        if (*text == 0) {
            snprintf(out, out_sz, "ERR");
            return -1;
        }

        return obex_map_client_send_sms(a->obex_map, bt_addr, recipient, text, out, out_sz);
    }

4) Update Makefile

Add the new source:

Makefile
	$(SRC_DIR)/obex_map_client.c \

So the SRCS block includes:

Makefile
SRCS := \
	$(SRC_DIR)/main.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/app.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/bluez_agent.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/bluez_manager.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/bluez_profile.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/ctrl_server.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/device_slots.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/hfp_backend.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/obex_map_client.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/map_mns.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/map_mse.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/map_sdp.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/msg_store.c \
	$(SRC_DIR)/log.c

5) How to use it

Build as before, and make sure obexd is installed/running. BlueZ’s OBEX client/session API is provided under org.bluez.obex, and MAP sending is done through MessageAccess1.PushMessage on the session object. ManKier+1

Test command:

Bash
printf "SMS_SEND AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF +33123456789 hello_from_device\n" | socat - UNIX-CONNECT:/tmp/bt_hfp_chatd.sock

Meaning:

  • AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF = remote Bluetooth device that exposes MAP

  • +33123456789 = recipient inside the bMessage

  • hello_from_device = message text

6) Honest status of this SMS feature

What is real now:

  • real OBEX session creation with MAP target ManKier+1

  • real MessageAccess1.PushMessage(...) call using bMessage source file Ubuntu Manpages

  • transfer completion polling through Transfer1.Status GitHub+1

What can still fail in practice:

  • remote device may not expose MAP at all

  • remote device may expose MAP but not support writable SMS send

  • remote device may support only EMAIL, MMS, or a different message type; SupportedTypes tells you what it reports Ubuntu Manpages

  • bMessage formatting may need small compatibility tuning for a specific phone/headset vendor

So this is a real first production-oriented SMS-send implementation, but interoperability still depends on the remote device’s actual MAP behavior.

The next best step is to add:

  • SMS_CAPS <bt_addr> to inspect MAP capabilities and SupportedTypes

  • SMS_SEND_ACTIVE <recipient> <text> to use the current active processing device automatically

  • transfer event callbacks instead of polling.


ChatGPT can make mistakes. Check important info. See Cookie Preferences.
